title: bromus squarrosus var. lanuginosus
intro: Bromus squarrosus var. lanuginosus is a variant of the dropseed grass, a perennial plant species that is native to Europe. It is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. Bromus squarrosus var. lanuginosus can be prepared as an herbal infusion or tincture, often used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
